To extend the existing minigit implementation with checkout and reset commands, 
we need to:                                                                     

 1 Implement the logic for these commands.                                      
 2 Update the main function to handle these new commands.                       

Let's start by implementing the checkout and reset functions in minigit.c.      

minigit.c                                                                       

                                                                                
#include <stdio.h>                                                              
                                                                                
#include <stdlib.h>                                                             
                                                                                
#include <string.h>                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
#define MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH 100                                                  
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
void checkout(char *branch) {                                                   
                                                                                
    printf("Checking out branch: %s\n", branch);                                
                                                                                
    // Add actual implementation here                                           
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
void reset(char *commit_hash) {                                                 
                                                                                
    printf("Resetting to commit: %s\n", commit_hash);                           
                                                                                
    // Add actual implementation here                                           
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {                                              
                                                                                
    if (argc < 2) {                                                             
                                                                                
        fprintf(stderr, "Usage: minigit <command> [args]\n");                   
                                                                                
        return 1;                                                               
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    char command[MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH];                                           
                                                                                
    strcpy(command, argv[1]);                                                   
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if (strcmp(command, "checkout") == 0) {                                     
                                                                                
        if (argc != 3) {                                                        
                                                                                
            fprintf(stderr, "Usage: minigit checkout <branch>\n");              
                                                                                
            return 1;                                                           
                                                                                
        }                                                                       
                                                                                
        checkout(argv[2]);                                                      
                                                                                
    } else if (strcmp(command, "reset") == 0) {                                 
                                                                                
        if (argc != 3) {                                                        
                                                                                
            fprintf(stderr, "Usage: minigit reset <commit_hash>\n");            
                                                                                
            return 1;                                                           
                                                                                
        }                                                                       
                                                                                
        reset(argv[2]);                                                         
                                                                                
    } else {                                                                    
                                                                                
        fprintf(stderr, "Unknown command: %s\n", command);                      
                                                                                
        return 1;                                                               
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    return 0;                                                                   
                                                                                
}
